name: io.github.matthewwolff/google-forms
description: Comprehensive MCP server for the Google Forms API — full coverage of form creation, management, responses, and built-in analytics

tools.name: create_form
tools.description: Create a new Google Form

tools.name: get_form
tools.description: Retrieve full form details

tools.name: update_form_info
tools.description: Update form title and description

tools.name: update_form_settings
tools.description: Update quiz mode and email collection settings

tools.name: add_question
tools.description: Add any question type (radio, checkbox, dropdown, text, paragraph, scale, date, time, rating)

tools.name: add_section
tools.description: Add a page break / section header

tools.name: add_text_item
tools.description: Add a static text block

tools.name: update_item
tools.description: Update an existing item's title or description

tools.name: delete_item
tools.description: Delete a form item by index

tools.name: move_item
tools.description: Move an item from one position to another

tools.name: list_responses
tools.description: List form responses with pagination and timestamp filtering

tools.name: get_response
tools.description: Retrieve a single response by ID

tools.name: create_watch
tools.description: Create a Pub/Sub watch for form events

tools.name: list_watches
tools.description: List active watches on a form

tools.name: delete_watch
tools.description: Delete a watch

tools.name: renew_watch
tools.description: Renew a watch for another 7 days

tools.name: build_form
tools.description: Create an entire form with sections and questions in one call

tools.name: get_form_summary
tools.description: Get a simplified, LLM-friendly view of form structure

tools.name: get_responses_table
tools.description: Get responses as a flat table with question titles as columns

tools.name: clone_form
tools.description: Duplicate a form with all its items

tools.name: export_responses_csv
tools.description: Export responses as CSV

tools.name: analyze_frequency
tools.description: Count answer frequencies for a question

tools.name: cross_tabulate
tools.description: Cross-tabulation between two questions

tools.name: generate_sankey_data
tools.description: Generate Sankey diagram data from flow stages

tools.name: response_summary
tools.description: Overview stats for all questions
